task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of scheduled job skips records created near midnight boundary: A scheduled processing job misses records created near the midnight boundary because the time window is calculated incorrectly.

failures: Issue was not reproducible before the fix
Fix was not verified after the change
Change scope exceeded the allowed boundary
Fix does not match the stated root cause

decision.reason: Rollback because one or more hard checks failed

notes.winner_pattern: The boundary bug may come from timezone conversion, inclusive/exclusive comparisons, or truncation to local midnight.
notes.loser_pattern: A naive fix could stop skipping records but create duplicate processing on later runs.
